name: shotshare
tagline: A self-hosted screenshot and image sharing service with shareable links
description: Shotshare is a self-hosted screenshot and image sharing service. It lets users quickly upload captures, get shareable links, and manage their image history in a clean web UI.

features.title: Upload Interface
features.description: Upload screenshots through a web UI

features.title: Image Preview
features.description: Preview shared screenshots in the browser

features.title: Minimal Interface
features.description: Use a simple interface for sharing

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the screenshot service on your own servers
